sectionSubtitle: A curated selection of AI, Data Science and Engineering projects.

project1.title: Local Multimodal RAG
project1.description: Intelligent conversational assistant using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) on complex technical documentation.
project1.problem: Technicians spent considerable time searching for vital information buried in industrial documents rich in diagrams and tables that traditional search systems ignored.
project1.solution: Implemented a 100% local RAG system with LangChain, multimodal embeddings via Gemma 4:12b (Ollama), and ChromaDB. The chatbot instantly retrieves relevant technical data (text and images), ensuring absolute privacy of industrial data.

project2.title: Rocket League Bot Detector
project2.description: Full-stack Machine Learning application to automatically classify players as humans or bots from replay files.
project2.problem: Cheating using AI bots in Rocket League disrupts competitive integrity, and manually identifying them from replay data is time-consuming and complex.
project2.solution: Built a full-stack system: a React/Vercel frontend with a secure proxy API, and a FastAPI Hugging Face backend. It extracts physical and network features from .replay files and runs a custom PyTorch model for highly accurate inference.
